key_insight: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown strong performance in generating formal proofs, their outputs often remain less readable, modular, maintainable, and reusable than proofs in mature formal mathematics libraries.
engineering_relevance: Potential relevance: theorem proving workflows and research evaluation.
